ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "base_cost" TEXT /* Base cost of the product */,
  "discount_with_item" TEXT /* Discount offered when purchased with another item */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of delivery */,
  "has_tracking" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product has tracking available */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews for the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active and available for sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being shipped */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination for the shipping */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the shipping */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., Express, Standard) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the shipping */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipping (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Placed, Processed, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order including shipping */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "related_product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related product */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score or relevance of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_related_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)
